use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes with smooth clip-path animations
Enhance user experience with animated view transitions on theme change
Add theme switching capability to navigation headers or settings panels
Provide visual feedback through animated Sun/Moon icon transitions
Integrate with existing dark mode class-based theming systems
ai_summary: An animated theme toggle button component that enables light/dark mode switching with smooth view transitions using the View Transitions API and Framer Motion. Features custom state management via a hook that observes document class changes, and supports horizontal or vertical clip-path animation effects. The button integrates Lucide icons (Sun/Moon) with morphing transitions for a polished dark/light mode toggle experience.
